name: feature.cms.nodes
description: CMS feature node pack (ADR 0064 Phase 3 / RFC 0103) — workflow nodes over the `ctx.features.cms` surface shipped by the CMS feature (ADR 0009). `get-page` reads a published page resolved for a target locale (exact → language-family → base); `translate-section` drafts a sparse per-locale overlay for a section's base data via the run-scoped provider (ctx.callAI). Both are role:action — get-page reads the tenant CMS store; translate-section is generative — so their outputs are recorded and replay/fork read the recorded result. Generation stays in the node (run-scoped), never in the read-only surface. The overlay is sanitized on persist (the page PATCH write path), not here.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: CMS Get Page (localized)
nodes.description: Fetch a published CMS page resolved for a target locale via ctx.features.cms.getPage. Inputs: { orgId, slug, locale? }. Output: { page, locale } — sections carry resolved `data` (exact → language-family → base per RFC 0103 §C); no `localizations` leaked. Published-only; null page when absent.

nodes.label: CMS List Pages
nodes.description: Lists an org's published CMS pages (pageId, slug, title, status) via ctx.features.cms.listPages. Inputs: { orgId }. Output: { pages }. Published-only; titles/slugs, not section bodies.

nodes.label: CMS Translate Section
nodes.description: Draft a sparse per-locale overlay for a section's base data via the run-scoped provider (ctx.callAI), structure-preserving JSON-in/JSON-out. Inputs: { data, targetLocale, provider?, model?, maxTokens? }. Output: { overlay, targetLocale } — a draft the editor reviews before saving; the page PATCH write path sanitizes it (anti-XSS / open-redirect).
